title: Cost of Capital: What is the cost of equity if a firm has...
summary: Calculate or evaluate the cost of capital using appropriate financial models.
prompt: What is the cost of equity if a firm has a beta of 1.2, a risk-free rate of 3%, and a market return of 8%?
solution: Cost of Equity = Risk-free rate + Beta × (Market return - Risk-free rate) = 3% + 1.2(8% - 3%) = 3% + 6% = 9%.
